purpose: Define the minimum deployment and domain operations contract for independent services so frontend and backend runtime placement, ingress ownership, and GCP-managed domain automation stay reviewable without central runtime ownership.
hard_rules: Deployment topology is incomplete until frontend and backend runtime placement are both declared.
If frontend_platform is gcp-cloud-run, gcp-cloud-storage, gcp-load-balancer, or gcp-firebase-hosting, frontend_deploy_project and ingress_mode must be current and reviewable.
If domain_routing_mode is cloud-run-domain-mapping or global-external-application-load-balancer, dns_provider, dns_zone_ref, and certificate_mode must be declared before production exposure.
Migration away from vercel must record both the target GCP hosting surface and the rollback entrypoint before apply planning is approved.
The contract may describe runtime ownership and operations boundaries, but it must not centralize runtime execution under ai-governance.
